targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

testFuzz_ClaimableNeverExceedsTotalAmoun.notice: Claimable amount should never exceed total amount This is the most critical invariant of the whole contract

testFuzz_MultipleClaimsEqualSingleClaim(.notice: Claiming multiple times should give same total as claiming once

testFuzz_TotalClaimedEqualsTotal(uint64,.notice: Total claimed after full vesting should equal total amount

test_Claim_FullAmountAfterVestingPeriod(.notice: Full amount claimable after vesting period ends

test_Claim_MultipleClaims_GivesCorrectTo.notice: Claiming twice should give correct cumulative amount

test_Claim_RevertsBeforeCliff().notice: Cannot claim before cliff period ends

test_Claim_SucceedsAtCliff().notice: Should be able to claim exactly at cliff

test_ContractIsNotPausedOnDeployment().notice: Contract should not be paused on deployment

test_CreateVestingSchedule_RevertsIfAlre.notice: Should revert if schedule already exists

test_CreateVestingSchedule_RevertsIfAmou.notice: Should revert if amount is zero

test_CreateVestingSchedule_RevertsIfClif.notice: Should revert if cliff is longer than vesting duration

test_CreateVestingSchedule_RevertsIfNotO.notice: Only owner should be able to create schedules

test_CreateVestingSchedule_TransfersToke.notice: Tokens should move from owner to contract on creation

test_DeploymentSetsOwnerCorrectly().notice: Verify the contract deploys with correct initial state

test_Revoke_BeneficiaryCanClaimVestedAmo.notice: Beneficiary can still claim vested amount after revocation

test_Revoke_ReturnsUnvestedTokensToOwner.notice: Owner can revoke and unvested tokens return to owner
